vocab.meaning: phối hợp, đoàn kết cùng nhau làm việc
vocab.example: Even when we were trailing behind, the team managed to pull together and win in the final minutes.

vocab.meaning: đạt tiêu chuẩn, đủ khả năng cạnh tranh
vocab.example: I was worried I wouldn't measure up to the other players in the academy, but I held my own.

vocab.meaning: thi tuyển vào một đội tuyển
vocab.example: In middle school, I decided to try out for the volleyball team on a whim and actually made the cut.

vocab.meaning: tụt lại phía sau (về điểm số hoặc thể lực)
vocab.example: During pre-season training, if you don't keep up with the drills, you quickly fall behind the rest of the squad.

vocab.meaning: không tham gia (do chấn thương hoặc quyết định của huấn luyện viên)
vocab.example: I had to sit out several matches last year because of a recurring ankle injury.

vocab.meaning: cổ vũ nồng nhiệt cho ai đó
vocab.example: Even when I wasn't on the pitch, I was always on the sidelines cheering on my teammates.

vocab.meaning: khởi động trước khi thi đấu/tập luyện
vocab.example: Our coach always insisted that we warm up thoroughly to prevent any preventable muscle strains.

vocab.meaning: bắt đầu nỗ lực, tập trung làm việc nghiêm túc
vocab.example: As the championship approached, we all had to knuckle down and intensify our training regime.

vocab.meaning: vực dậy, phục hồi nhanh chóng sau thất bại
vocab.example: It was a tough loss, but the team's ability to bounce back in the next game was truly impressive.

vocab.meaning: từ bỏ, bỏ lỡ (một cơ hội)
vocab.example: I was offered a spot on the regional team, but I had to pass up the opportunity due to my final exams.
